description: A dashboard that monitors current Karpenter node costs and spot savings based on cloud provider offering metrics. These values are estimated instance prices, not billing data. For deeper cost analysis, deploy OpenCost (https://github.com/opencost/opencost) and opencost-mixin (https://github.com/adinhodovic/opencost-mixin/). The dashboards were generated using [kubernetes-autoscaling-mixin](https://github.com/adinhodovic/kubernetes-autoscaling-mixin). Open issues and create feature requests in the repository.

panels.description: Estimated monthly run rate based on current Karpenter nodes and cloud provider price estimates.

targets.expr:
(sum(
  (
    max by (instance_type, capacity_type, zone) (
  karpenter_cloudprovider_instance_type_offering_price_estimate{
    cluster="$cluster",
job=~"$job"
,
    zone=~"$zone",
    instance_type=~"$instance_type",
    capacity_type=~"$capacity_type"
  }
)

  )
  * on (instance_type, capacity_type, zone)
  (
    count by (region, zone, instance_type, capacity_type) (
  max by (node_name, region, zone, instance_type, capacity_type) (
    karpenter_nodes_allocatable{
      cluster="$cluster",
job=~"$job"
,
nodepool=~"$nodepool"
,
region=~"$region",
zone=~"$zone"
,
arch=~"$arch",
os=~"$os",
instance_type=~"$instance_type",
capacity_type=~"$capacity_type"
,
      resource_type="cpu"
    }
  )
)

  )
)
) * 730

panels.title: Estimated Monthly Cost

panels.description: Estimated monthly run-rate savings if current Karpenter nodes were priced at spot rates instead of on-demand.
panels.title: Estimated Monthly Spot Savings

panels.description: Estimated monthly cost split by capacity type.

targets.expr:
(sum by (capacity_type) (
  (
    max by (instance_type, capacity_type, zone) (
  karpenter_cloudprovider_instance_type_offering_price_estimate{
    cluster="$cluster",
job=~"$job"
,
    zone=~"$zone",
    instance_type=~"$instance_type",
    capacity_type=~"$capacity_type"
  }
)

  )
  * on (instance_type, capacity_type, zone)
  (
    count by (region, zone, instance_type, capacity_type) (
  max by (node_name, region, zone, instance_type, capacity_type) (
    karpenter_nodes_allocatable{
      cluster="$cluster",
job=~"$job"
,
nodepool=~"$nodepool"
,
region=~"$region",
zone=~"$zone"
,
arch=~"$arch",
os=~"$os",
instance_type=~"$instance_type",
capacity_type=~"$capacity_type"
,
      resource_type="cpu"
    }
  )
)

  )
)
) * 730

panels.title: Estimated Monthly Cost by Capacity Type

panels.description: Estimated monthly cost split by architecture.

targets.expr:
(sum by (arch) (
  (
    count by (arch, zone, instance_type, capacity_type) (
  max by (node_name, arch, zone, instance_type, capacity_type) (
    karpenter_nodes_allocatable{
      cluster="$cluster",
job=~"$job"
,
nodepool=~"$nodepool"
,
region=~"$region",
zone=~"$zone"
,
arch=~"$arch",
os=~"$os",
instance_type=~"$instance_type",
capacity_type=~"$capacity_type"
,
      resource_type="cpu"
    }
  )
)

  )
  * on (instance_type, capacity_type, zone) group_left()
  (
    max by (instance_type, capacity_type, zone) (
  karpenter_cloudprovider_instance_type_offering_price_estimate{
    cluster="$cluster",
job=~"$job"
,
    zone=~"$zone",
    instance_type=~"$instance_type",
    capacity_type=~"$capacity_type"
  }
)

  )
)
) * 730

panels.title: Estimated Monthly Cost by Architecture

panels.description: Estimated monthly cost split by node pool.

    karpenter_nodes_allocatable{
      cluster="$cluster",

,

,

,
arch=~"$arch",

,
      resource_type="cpu"

  )
)

  )
  * on (instance_type, capacity_type, zone) group_left()
  (

    cluster="$cluster",
job=~"$job"
,
    zone=~"$zone",

)

)
) * 730

  (

  max by (node_name, region, zone, instance_type, capacity_type) (
    karpenter_nodes_allocatable{
      cluster="$cluster",
job=~"$job"
,
nodepool=~"$nodepool"

,

panels.title: Estimated Monthly Spot Savings by Node Pool

panels.description: Average monthly on-demand and spot cost estimates per instance type across the selected zones.
panels.title: Spot versus On-Demand Comparison

list.label: Instance Type
list.name: instance_type
list.query: label_values(karpenter_nodes_allocatable{cluster="$cluster", job=~"$job", region=~"$region", zone=~"$zone", arch=~"$arch", os=~"$os"}, instance_type)

list.label: Capacity Type
list.name: capacity_type
list.query: label_values(karpenter_nodes_allocatable{cluster="$cluster", job=~"$job", region=~"$region", zone=~"$zone", arch=~"$arch", os=~"$os", instance_type=~"$instance_type"}, capacity_type)

list.label: Node Pool
list.name: nodepool
list.query: label_values(karpenter_nodes_allocatable{cluster="$cluster", job=~"$job", region=~"$region", zone=~"$zone", arch=~"$arch", os=~"$os", instance_type=~"$instance_type", capacity_type=~"$capacity_type"}, nodepool)

title: Kubernetes / Autoscaling / Karpenter / Costs
